steps.title: Identify the key requirement in the goal
steps.content: The phrase “in relation to other minerals” is the decisive clue. We need a statement that demonstrates quartz's hardness by comparing it to other minerals on the scale.

steps.title: Find the choice that positions quartz's hardness relative to others
steps.content: Choice D does this: it shows quartz scratches apatite but not diamond—placing quartz between two other minerals. The others focus on different minerals or describe the framework without addressing quartz's relative position. That matches choice D — D is correct.
